race.description: Fay & Kalan's Memorial Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: KISS OF GOLD (5) made late ground but found the winner a shade too strong when fresh from a spell in that same 900m maiden here three weeks ago. Lightly raced filly who can improve enough to take this out. BOBBY (1) filled a placing for the first time when fresh from a spell over this course and distance last time. Can go on with it now. MR CACCIATORE (2) is a Harry Angel gelding on debut for the B Lees camp. Has impressed in his lead-up work and can make a bright start. BLIGHTY BOY (13) also steps out for the first time and strips fitter for a Wyong trial win. Have to respect any market moves.
